title: Gooey Grilled Korean Cheonggukjang Skewers
description: A nostalgic and savory dish featuring fermented cheonggukjang, grilled to perfection, this recipe is an ayurvedic-sattvic friendly twist on a traditional Korean favorite, often enjoyed in Saudi Arabian cuisine
instructions: Soak the bamboo skewers in water for 30 minutes before grilling.
Preheat the grill to medium high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender, combine cheonggukjang, tofu, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, sesame oil, and brown sugar, and blend until smooth.
Thread the blended cheonggukjang mixture onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking, then grill the skewers for 5 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with green onions and your choice of sides.
To enhance the dish, serve with a side of steamed vegetables or a small salad.
For an added crunch, top the skewers with toasted sesame seeds before serving.
